address: 4005 West Parmer Lane, Suite E, Austin, TX 78727

items.name: Classic Cheese Pizza
items.description: Build your own starting with classic cheese. Add toppings for extra. Regular toppings: fresh basil, cilantro, roma tomato, green peppers, red onions, kalamata olives, jalapenos, spinach, crushed pineapple, banana peppers, black olives, rosemary, oregano, artichoke, wild arugula, tortilla strips. Specialty toppings (extra charge): portabella mushrooms, grilled chicken, feta, cheddar, fresh mozzarella, bacon, sage sausage, ground beef, anchovies, BBQ chicken, buffalo chicken, roasted garlic, sriracha honey brussels sprouts, prosciutto, goat cheese, pepperoni, pit smoked ham, genoa salami, fresh parmesan

items.name: Italian Grinder
items.description: Salami, pit smoked ham, house pepperoni, mozzarella, lettuce, roma tomato, red onion, mayonnaise, mustard and Italian dressing. Served with choice of chips, pit smoked potato salad or sriracha honey brussels sprouts. Served chilled

items.name: Club Grinder
items.description: Turkey breast, pit smoked ham, bacon, lettuce, roma tomato, mozzarella, mustard and mayonnaise. Served chilled

items.description: Bacon, lettuce, tomato and mozzarella with mayonnaise. Served chilled

items.name: Turkey Grinder
items.description: Turkey breast, lettuce, roma tomato, mozzarella, mustard and mayonnaise. Served chilled

items.name: Black Olive and Pesto Grinder
items.description: Black olives, mozzarella, fresh baby spinach, roma tomato, red onions on a pesto base. Served chilled

items.description: Pit smoked ham, mozzarella cheese, lettuce, roma tomato, mustard, mayonnaise and Italian dressing. Served chilled

items.name: Portabella Mushroom Grinder

items.name: House Salad
items.description: Mixed lettuce topped with roma tomatoes, green peppers, red onions, cheddar cheese, and croutons. Recommended dressing: chicken and cabernet

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Mixed lettuce topped with fresh parmesan, tomatoes and croutons. Recommended dressing: chicken and caesar

items.name: Fiesta Salad
items.description: Mixed lettuce with green peppers, red onions, roma tomatoes, cheddar cheese, and tortilla strips. Recommended dressing: chicken and blue cheese

items.description: Fresh baby spinach topped with roma tomatoes, feta cheese and texas pecans. Recommended dressing: chicken and cabernet

items.name: Greenbelt Salad
items.description: Mixed lettuce topped with red onions, fresh portabella mushrooms, feta cheese and texas pecans. Recommended dressing: chicken and lemon vinaigrette

items.name: Greek Salad
items.description: Mixed lettuce topped with kalamata olives, artichoke, and feta cheese. Recommended dressing: chicken and greek

items.name: El Ranchero Salad
items.description: Mixed lettuce topped with black olives, green peppers, red onions, cheddar cheese and croutons. Recommended dressing: meat trio (ham, pepperoni, bacon) and ranch

items.name: Zilker Salad
items.description: Fresh wild arugula and mixed lettuce topped with cranberries, goat cheese and texas pecans. Recommended dressing: prosciutto and cabernet vinaigrette
